# Changelog: CODEAPS

All notable changes to the CODEAPS project will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2026-05-10
### Added
- Initial project structure with Tauri and React.
- Python Sidecar integrated with FastAPI.
- Monaco Editor with custom layout management.
- Integrated Terminal with multi-tab support.
- AI Analysis Engine foundation.
- **Documentation Overhaul**: Created root `README.md`, `DOCUMENTATION.md`, and established the documentation process.

### Fixed
- Layout sync issues in `useLayoutStore`.
- Terminal tab reference errors.
